methodology: Each translation was manually validated by a Power BI expert against the original QlikView source. DAX references were verified for correct table/column mapping using fields.csv metadata. M Query scripts were validated for structural equivalence to the original LOAD statements.

dax.reference_dax: '# of Flights' = SUM('Main Data'[# Departures Performed])
dax.validation_notes: Direct SUM aggregation. Measure name matches expression parent label exactly.

dax.reference_dax: '# of Enplanned Passengers' = SUM('Main Data'[# Transported Passengers])
dax.validation_notes: Direct SUM. Field correctly resolved to Main Data table via fields.csv.
Measure name should follow parent label. 'Total' prefix is unnecessary.
Same pattern as dax_003. Measure name from parent label.
Parent label is 'Flights'. LLM used field name instead.
Parent label is 'Passengers'. LLM used descriptive name instead.
Correct function and table reference. Naming differs.
Same pattern. All CH02 measures use shorter parent-derived names.

m_query.reference_m_query:
let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Flight Data.qvd")),
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
    TypedColumns = Table.TransformColumnTypes(PromotedHeaders, {
        {"%Airline ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Carrier Group ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Unique Carrier Code", type text},
        {"%Unique Carrier Entity Code", type text},
        {"%Region Code", type text},
        {"%Origin Airport ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Origin Airport Sequence ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Origin Airport Market ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Origin World Area Code", Int64.Type},
        {"%Destination Airport ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Destination Airport Sequence ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Destination Airport Market ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Destination World Area Code", Int64.Type},
        {"%Aircraft Group ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Aircraft Type ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Aircraft Configuration ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Distance Group ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Service Class ID", Int64.Type},
        {"%Datasource ID", Int64.Type},
        {"# Departures Scheduled", Int64.Type},
        {"# Departures Performed", Int64.Type},
        {"# Payload", Int64.Type},
        {"Distance", Int64.Type},
        {"# Available Seats", Int64.Type},
        {"# Transported Passengers", Int64.Type},
        {"# Transported Freight", Int64.Type},
        {"# Transported Mail", Int64.Type},
        {"# Ramp-To-Ramp Time", Int64.Type},
        {"# Air Time", Int64.Type},
        {"Unique Carrier", type text},
        {"Carrier Code", type text},
        {"Carrier Name", type text},
        {"Origin Airport Code", type text},
        {"Origin City", type text},
        {"Origin State Code", type text},
        {"Origin State FIPS", Int64.Type},
        {"Origin State", type text},
        {"Origin Country Code", type text},
        {"Origin Country", type text},
        {"Destination Airport Code", type text},
        {"Destination City", type text},
        {"Destination State Code", type text},
        {"Destination State FIPS", Int64.Type},
        {"Destination State", type text},
        {"Destination Country Code", type text},
        {"Destination Country", type text},
        {"Year", Int64.Type},
        {"Period", Int64.Type},
        {"Quarter", Int64.Type},
        {"Month (#)", Int64.Type},
        {"Month", type text},
        {"From - To Airport Code", type text},
        {"From - To Airport ID", Int64.Type},
        {"From - To City", type text},
        {"From - To State Code", type text},
        {"From - To State", type text}
    })
in
    TypedColumns
m_query.validation_notes: All 51 fields from the QlikView LOAD mapped to typed M Query columns. Uses 'type text' instead of 'Text.Type' for text columns (both valid). Step name 'TypedColumns' instead of 'ChangedType'.

let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Aircraft Groups.qvd")),
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
    RenamedColumns = Table.RenameColumns(PromotedHeaders, {{"%Aircraft Group ID", "Aircraft Group ID"}})
in
    RenamedColumns
m_query.validation_notes: Removes redundant no-op rename of 'Aircraft Group' to 'Aircraft Group' that appears in the generated version.
